song: 20 - Nice Work If You Can Get It
comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato) + Refrain (smoothly). Pipeline has high coverage (96%) but several OCR garble issues, stage-direction-as-lyrics, and verse-stacking artifacts.

1.comment: Pipeline stacked verse lyrics 'who The man on'. Published verse 1: 'The man who on-'.

3.comment: Pipeline had 'that Lives life nt'. Published: 'Lives a life that is-'.

4.comment: Pipeline had 'nec es sa ri ly sun ny.' (7 on 7n). Published: 'n't nec-es-sa-ri-ly sun-ny.'.

11.comment: Pipeline had 'that the on work ly' (scrambled). Published: 'the on-ly work that'.

13.comment: Pipeline had 'Is kind for' (3 on 3n). Published: 'Is the kind that's for' — but only 3 notes, so: 'Is the kind'.

14.comment: Pipeline had 'girl and boy meant,'. Published: 'girl and boy meant,' — correct but note 'that's for' carries from m13.

19.comment: Pipeline had 'get it. SS' -- 'SS' is OCR garbage. Published: 'get it.'.

20.comment: Pipeline read 'Refrain' as a lyric. It's a section heading, not a sung word.

21.comment: Pipeline had 'Hold mg hands at'. Published: 'Hold-ing hands at'.

25.comment: Pipeline dropped 'if' from 'Nice work if you can'. Published: 'Nice work if you can'.

31.comment: Pipeline had 'Sigh ing sigh aft'. Published: 'Sigh-ing sigh aft-'.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'Just I'm ag ine'. Published: 'Just im-ag-ine'.

39.comment: Pipeline had 'Wait ing at cot tage'. Published: 'Wait-ing at the cot-tage'. But 5n, so: 'Wait ing at the cot'? Actually PDF shows 'Wait-ing at the cot-tage' with 'the' clearly present but pipeline dropped it. Pipeline has 5 lyrics on 5n+1r. Let me check: 'Wait ing at cot tage' = 5 tokens, 'Wait-ing at the cot-tage' = 6 syllables. Pipeline dropped 'the'.

42.comment: Pipeline had 'come one Who could' (4 on 5n). Published: 'come one_ Who could'.

43.comment: Pipeline had 'ask for an y thing'' with stray quote. Published: 'ask for an-y-thing'.

47.comment: Pipeline had 'And then tak ly ing for that ing' (8 lyrics on 5n — severe garble). Published: 'And then tak-ing that'.

48.comment: Pipeline had 'vow, mon' — 'mon' is OCR garbage. Published: 'vow,'.

49.comment: Pipeline dropped 'if'. Published: 'Nice work if you can'.

50.comment: Pipeline had 'get it, And if you' (5 on 5n). Published: 'get it, And if you'.

53.comment: Pipeline 1st ending 'how?' correct. No change needed for ending 1.
